summary: P74 Layout Builder Foundation API Testing - All 30 test scenarios passed. Tested component definitions CRUD with schema validation/key conflict, layout pages scope uniqueness, revision draft/publish/archive flow with single published guarantee, bindings bind/unbind with active uniqueness, public resolve endpoint with fallback logic, cache behavior (working but source field bug), metrics tracking, and RBAC enforcement.

minor.issue: Cache hit response source field shows 'default' or 'binding' instead of 'cache'. Cache IS working (metrics confirm hits), but response source field is overwritten during dict unpacking at line 755 in layout_builder_routes.py. Fix: change line 755 to `return {**cached[1], 'source': 'cache'}` to override source after unpacking.

action_items: LOW: Fix cache hit source field in /api/site/content-layout/resolve - change line 755 from `return {'source': 'cache', **cached[1]}` to `return {**cached[1], 'source': 'cache'}`
critical_code_review_comments: Cache implementation is correct but source field override bug in line 755 - dict unpacking order causes 'cache' to be overwritten by original source
All domain services correctly handle conflicts and constraints
Single published revision constraint enforced via unique partial index works correctly
Active binding uniqueness constraint enforced correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test components, pages, revisions, and bindings with unique markers for each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: P74 Layout Builder Foundation APIs fully functional. All CRUD operations work. Revision flow (draft->publish->archive) enforces single published constraint. Bindings support bind/unbind with active uniqueness. Public resolve endpoint returns correct pages with fallback logic. Cache works but has minor source field bug. Metrics and audit logs accessible to admin roles. RBAC enforced on admin endpoints.

component_definitions_crud.details: Create with valid schema, 400 for invalid schema, 409 for key conflict, list with pagination, patch updates version

layout_pages_crud.details: Create with null/non-null category_id, 409 for scope conflict (page_type+country+module+category_id), list with filters, patch updates

revision_flow.details: Create draft, publish creates new published revision, archive sets status=archived and published_at=null, single published guarantee enforced

bindings_flow.details: Bind category to page, get active binding, unbind deactivates, rebind deactivates previous

public_resolve.details: Binding takes precedence, falls back to default page (category_id=null), 404 when no default exists

cache_behavior.details: Cache working correctly (metrics confirm hits), but source field shows original source instead of 'cache'

metrics.details: resolve_requests, cache_hits/misses, binding_hits, default_hits, publish_count, binding_changes all tracked

audit_logs.details: List with pagination, filter by entity_type, filter by action - all working

rbac.details: Admin endpoints return 401 without auth, public resolve accessible without auth

test_scenarios_executed: 1. Create component with valid JSON schema - 200 OK
2. Create component with invalid schema - 400 Bad Request
3. Create component with duplicate key - 409 Conflict
4. List components with pagination - 200 OK
5. Patch component updates name/schema/version - 200 OK
6. Create layout page with null category_id - 200 OK
7. Create layout page with duplicate scope - 409 Conflict
8. Create layout page with category_id - 200 OK
9. List layout pages with filters - 200 OK
10. Patch layout page - 200 OK
11. Create draft revision - 200 OK with status=draft
12. Publish revision creates new published - 200 OK
13. Single published guarantee - only 1 published per page
14. Re-publish archived revision - 409 only_draft_can_be_published
15. Archive revision - 200 OK with status=archived, published_at=null
16. Patch draft revision payload - 200 OK
17. Bind category to page - 200 OK with is_active=true
18. Get active binding - returns correct binding
19. Unbind category - 200 OK with unbound_count
20. Verify no active binding after unbind - item=null
21. Rebind deactivates previous binding
22. Public resolve with binding returns binding source
23. Public resolve fallback to default page
24. Public resolve 404 when no default exists
25. Cache working - metrics show cache_hits incrementing
26. Get metrics - all fields present
27. List audit logs with pagination
28. Filter audit logs by entity_type
29. Filter audit logs by action
30. RBAC - admin endpoints require auth, public resolve open
